Commercial Mar 4, 2026

End Of An Era: UK Has No Boeing 747 Passenger Flights In 2026

Recent schedule changes have confirmed that Korean Air will not be bringing its Boeing 747-8 back to the United Kingdom this year. It represents the end of the last scheduled commercial passenger route to and from the UK that was using the Queen of the Skies.
